The Korean War Memorial Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Shew
about_quotes.evidence: You know Matt Catingub the saxophone player? ... Matt is a brilliant young saxophone player. He lives in Vegas, and a writer and all of that. He was on Louie Bellson’s band and all of that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Shew interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 1, 2020
